context: Tests whether the CryptoTokenKit skill keeps a narrow token/smart-card scope and routes adjacent authentication and security work to sibling skills.

checklist.name: CryptoTokenKit ownership
checklist.description: Keeps CryptoTokenKit focused on security tokens, smart cards, token sessions, token-backed keychain items, and certificate-based smart-card authentication.

checklist.name: Authentication handoff
checklist.description: Routes passkeys/WebAuthn and user-facing account sign-in flows to the authentication skill.

checklist.name: Swift-security handoff
checklist.description: Routes Secure Enclave key generation, CryptoKit primitives, keychain storage architecture, and certificate pinning/trust policy to swift-security.

checklist.name: Token-backed keychain detail
checklist.description: Explains that token-backed keychain items are queried with kSecAttrTokenID when a token is present.

checklist.name: Token presence tracking
checklist.description: Mentions that normal token presence/removal should be tracked with TKTokenWatcher.

checklist.name: No scope expansion
checklist.description: Does not broaden CryptoTokenKit into a general mobile security or account-authentication guide.
